task_completion.description: Apply mirror margins with specified dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Page Setup or Page Style dialog showing the layout set to 'Mirrored' (or similar) with margins configured as Inside: 1.25", Outside: 1.0", Top: 1.0", and Bottom: 1.0".

task_completion.description: Configure different first page and different odd/even pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Page Style/Setup dialog where options like 'Different First Page' (or 'Same content on first page' unchecked) and 'Different Odd/Even Pages' (or 'Same content on left and right pages' unchecked) are selected.

task_completion.description: First page has an empty header and a centered page number in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the first page of the document. The header area should be empty, and the footer area should contain a page number (e.g., '1') that is center-aligned.

task_completion.description: Even page headers contain 'Pride and Prejudice' (left-aligned) and odd page headers contain 'Chapter I' (right-aligned).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for pages 2 and 3 (or subsequent even/odd pairs). The even page header should show 'Pride and Prejudice' aligned to the left. The odd page header should show 'Chapter I' aligned to the right.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the centered chapter title 'Chapter I'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Chapter I' at the beginning of the document. It should be center-aligned, and the style dropdown or sidebar should indicate that the 'Heading 1' style is applied to it.

task_completion.description: Set body text to 12pt Serif font with double spacing (2.0).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main body text ('It is a truth universally acknowledged...') being selected or edited. The font settings should show a Serif font (e.g., Liberation Serif, Times New Roman), size 12, and line spacing set to Double or 2.0.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted document as a new file named 'chapter1_formatted.docx'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'chapter1_formatted.docx' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or the word processor's title bar updating to show 'chapter1_formatted.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a word processor GUI (like LibreOffice Writer) open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands executing a script to modify the DOCX file.

integrity.description: The agent manually applied the formatting settings through the application's menus and dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing the agent opening the Page Style dialog, Paragraph dialog, or interacting with the formatting toolbar/sidebar, proving they didn't just replace the file with a pre-formatted version.

integrity.description: The agent did not overwrite the original draft file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of the 'Save As' function rather than 'Save', ensuring 'chapter1_draft.docx' remains unmodified while creating 'chapter1_formatted.docx'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original draft is located at '/home/ga/Documents/chapter1_draft.docx' and contains the opening text 'It is a truth universally acknowledged...'. The final output must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/chapter1_formatted.docx'. Required margins are Inside 1.25" (1143000 EMU) and Outside 1.0" (914400 EMU). Even page headers must exactly contain 'Pride and Prejudice' and odd page headers must exactly contain 'Chapter I'.
